turn.content: Oh no, oh no, no... ten minutes? How do we... how do we choose?! I don't know this guy. How can I...  What if... what if we don't agree?!
No, no, no, this can't be happening! You're gonna kill us either way! That's not fair! Let me out, please, just let me go!

Please, stop! Please don't talk like that! Think about it... there's gotta be a way out of here. We have to talk, have to figure this out, for me, for my family, for... for anyone... I've got a wife, kids, please...
Your family?! You're talking about your family?! What about mine?! I've got a mom, I've got a fiancé... I've got a life! I don't want to die here! Stop saying stuff like that, it's not helping!

7 minutes. Stop your pathetic whining. It's not gonna help. The fact is, one of you is gonna die. Don't come crawling to me for mercy. You two need to take responsibility for your own fate. Quit playing hero and make a choice. Both of you agree, it goes. Don't, I kill whoever I want. No more whining. Start talking.
P-please, don't kill her! I-I'll give my life, just please don't hurt her! My family... they have nothing to do with this! I... I'll do anything, just let her out!
What the hell, Elias? Shut up! He's playing you, don't be stupid! He wants something, a show, entertainment, something! Just... just calm down, think...

message: Run failed (gen 1, variant 0) — Groq returned an error or the model is unavailable.
